item.title: 麻省理工学院 CSAIL 部署三个人工智能代理来构建现实的机器人训练世界
item.summary: MIT CSAIL released SceneSmith, a three-agent AI framework that generates physically realistic 3D indoor scenes from text prompts for robotics simulation, producing 3–6x more objects per room than prior methods with over 95% physical stability.
